announcements.headline: Quarterly Production Report - March 2026
summary: Iron ore production increased 4% QoQ to 72Mt, driven by Pilbara expansion
Copper output at 480kt, slightly below guidance of 500kt due to weather disruptions
Coal division reported record quarterly tonnage of 16Mt
FY26 full-year guidance maintained across all major commodities
Net debt reduced to US$8.2B as free cash flow remained strong

announcements.headline: Half Year Results – Net profit up 6% to $5.1B
summary: Cash net profit after tax rose 6% to $5.1B for 1H FY26
Net interest margin held at 1.99%, stable despite competitive pressure
Home loan book grew 8% annualised, maintaining market share above 25%
Interim dividend declared at $2.40 per share, fully franked
Operating costs rose 3.5% reflecting continued technology investment

announcements.headline: CSL acquires European plasma collection network for $680M
summary: CSL to acquire PlasmaColl GmbH, a 42-centre European plasma collection network, for €420M (~$680M AUD)
Acquisition expands CSL's Behring plasma supply chain in Germany, Austria and Switzerland
Expected to be EPS neutral in first year and accretive from FY28 onwards
Funded through existing debt facilities; no equity raising required
Regulatory approval expected within 6–9 months

announcements.headline: Final Investment Decision – Scarborough LNG Phase 2
summary: Woodside approves Final Investment Decision for Scarborough LNG Phase 2, capex US$4.1B
Phase 2 adds 5Mtpa capacity, bringing total Pluto Train 2 output to 10Mtpa
Long-term offtake agreements signed with four Asian buyers for 80% of volumes
First LNG cargo expected in FY31
Project supports Woodside's target of growing production to 200 MMboe/yr by FY30

announcements.headline: Annual General Meeting – Results of Voting
summary: All resolutions passed at the 2026 Annual General Meeting held in Perth
Remuneration report approved with 92.4% votes in favour
Re-election of three directors carried with strong shareholder support
CEO provided brief trading update: Bunnings comparable sales up 3.8% YTD
No material new announcements made beyond the formal AGM agenda

announcements.headline: FDA Grants Priority Review for Illuccix Prostate Imaging Expansion
summary: FDA granted Priority Review designation for sNDA expanding Illuccix label to biochemical recurrence
PDUFA action date set for Q3 2026
Illuccix already approved for initial staging; this expansion targets a significantly larger patient population
No additional clinical data required; submission based on existing pivotal trial data
Telix expects US commercial launch in this indication by late 2026 if approved

announcements.headline: Xero announces $200M on-market share buyback
summary: Xero initiates a $200M on-market share buyback program over 12 months
Buyback funded from existing cash reserves of $1.6B; no debt funding required
FY26 subscriber growth guidance maintained at 12–15%
Management cited shares trading below intrinsic value as rationale
Board approved under existing capital management framework

announcements.headline: NEXTDC S4 Sydney Data Centre reaches 100MW milestone
summary: NEXTDC's S4 Sydney facility has reached 100MW contractual capacity, ahead of schedule
Current contracted utilisation at 94%, indicating near-full occupancy
Expansion to 150MW underway with completion targeted for mid-2027
Three hyperscale customers signed long-term contracts in the quarter
Management reiterates FY26 revenue guidance of $430–450M

announcements.headline: Trading Halt Pending Capital Raise Announcement
summary: IGO Limited has entered a Trading Halt pending release of a capital raise announcement
Halt effective from market open; expected to be lifted by 10am tomorrow
No details on size or use of proceeds disclosed at this stage
Company has been exploring acquisitions in the battery minerals sector
Investors advised to await further announcement before making trading decisions

announcements.headline: REA Group Director Resignation – Mr. James Chen
summary: Mr. James Chen has resigned from the REA Group board effective 25 March 2026
Mr. Chen served as an independent non-executive director for 7 years
Resignation cited personal reasons; no disagreement with management or board
Board intends to commence a search for a replacement director
Current board composition remains compliant with ASX Corporate Governance Principles

announcements.headline: Quarterly Activities and Cashflow Report – March 2026
summary: Lithium production from Wodgina rose 12% QoQ to 148kt spodumene concentrate
Mining services division revenue increased 8% driven by higher activity levels
Net cash position improved to $320M following asset sale proceeds
Capex guidance for FY26 maintained at $1.4–1.6B
Pilbara port infrastructure commissioning ahead of schedule

announcements.headline: ANZ declares fully franked interim dividend of $0.83 per share
summary: ANZ declares interim dividend of $0.83 per ordinary share, fully franked
Ex-dividend date: 4 April 2026; payment date: 2 May 2026
Dividend reinvestment plan (DRP) activated with a 1.5% discount to market price
Payout ratio of 65% in line with the bank's stated capital return policy
Record date for dividend entitlement: 7 April 2026
